_comment: SAMPLE DATA — not final scraped data. Will be replaced with real scraped content in a later phase.
eligibility: Minimum 60% marks in Intermediate (pre-engineering / pre-medical / computer science) or equivalent. At least 60% in Matriculation.
admission_test: NU Test (FAST entry test) or NTS-NAT. Test score carries weight in merit calculation.
merit_criteria: Merit is calculated based on: Matric (10%), Intermediate (40%), Entry Test (50%). Closing merit varies by campus and year.
fee_info: Approximate annual fee: PKR 350,000 (varies by campus). Additional charges for hostel and other facilities.
source_note: SAMPLE — based on publicly known FAST NUCES admission criteria. Verify from https://nu.edu.pk/Admission

eligibility: Minimum 60% marks in Intermediate (pre-engineering / computer science) or equivalent. At least 60% in Matriculation.

_comment: SAMPLE DATA — not final scraped data.
eligibility: Minimum 60% marks in Intermediate or equivalent. Pre-engineering / pre-medical (with additional math) / computer science background preferred.
admission_test: NET (NUST Entry Test) — scores from NET-1 to NET-4 are accepted for the respective admission year.
merit_criteria: Merit aggregate: Matric (15%), Intermediate (20%), NET Score (65%). Closing merit for CS is typically very high.
fee_info: Approximate annual fee: PKR 250,000 - 300,000. Hostel and other charges extra.
source_note: SAMPLE — based on publicly known NUST admission criteria. Verify from https://nust.edu.pk/admissions

merit_criteria: Merit aggregate: Matric (15%), Intermediate (20%), NET Score (65%).

_comment: SAMPLE DATA — not final scraped data.
eligibility: Minimum 50% marks in Intermediate or equivalent (pre-engineering / pre-medical with additional math / computer science).
admission_test: CUI Entry Test or NTS-NAT. Test is mandatory for all applicants.
merit_criteria: Merit based on: Matric (10%), Intermediate (40%), Entry Test (50%). Varies by campus — Islamabad campus usually has the highest cutoff.
fee_info: Approximate annual fee: PKR 150,000 - 200,000. Lower than private universities.
source_note: SAMPLE — based on publicly known COMSATS admission criteria. Verify from https://comsats.edu.pk/admissions
